case_title: NOCON, ANDY vs. DONELY, ARNITIAL et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NOCON, ANDY AS TO DEFENDANT DONELY, ARNITIAL DOES 1-5 SUMMONS ISSUED
EXECUTION FOR MONEY, POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DONELY, ARNITIAL
COURT TRIAL ON DEC-27-1999 OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ENTERED.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT DONELY, ARNITIAL ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DONELY, ARNITIAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 155 TURK STREET, APT. 306, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102 $1,948.18 RENT, $560.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $139.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,647.18, LEASE FORFEITED
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY, POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT DONELY, ARNITIAL
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NOCON, ANDY COURT TRIAL SET FOR DEC-27-1999 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 514 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $16.30 FILED BY PLAINTIFF NOCON, ANDY
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT DONELY, ARNITIAL

JUDGE: CARLOS BEA REPORTER: KERRY GILLETT CLERK: GARTH SAYERS BAILIFF: WALT WEATHERLY DEPARTMENT 514 ASSIGNED FROM DEPT. OF PRESIDING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF APPEARED THROUGH ROBERT WISHNER, ESQ. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. WITNESS WAS SWORN AND EXAMINED ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE WAS MARKED, MOVED, & ENTERED INTO EVID. JUDGMENT: RESTORE PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF; PAY $655.00 RENT, $1,948.18 DAMAGES AS OF 12/27/99, CONTINUING AT $16.51 PER DAY, COSTS OF $139.00, AND ATTORNEY FEES PER SCHEDULE. EVID. WAS ORDERED RETURNED TO COUNSEL.
